summary: This document outlines KeepMeCompany's data security and protection policies aligned with the NHS Data Security and Protection Toolkit. It details the collection, storage, and sharing of patient health data through their AI phone intake solution, emphasizing GDPR compliance and UK/EU cloud infrastructure. The text also covers transparency measures, patient rights, and asset management responsibilities.
